Appearances:
Plaintiff, John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Jason Bandara
Attorney, John Zanghi, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Floyd Harra, is present.
Attorney,Matthew Gale, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. , for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-23-2010 is vacated.
